Keeping Mum (2006)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $1,619,466Details
International Box Office $16,494,571
Worldwide Box Office $18,114,037
Further financial details...

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$27,112 (1.7% of total gross)
Legs:7.28 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:8.9% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Theater counts:2 opening theaters/79 max. theaters, 7.6 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $2,955,711

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: September 15th, 2006 (Limited) by ThinkFilm
Video Release: February 20th, 2007 by Velocity/ThinkFilm
MPA Rating: R for language and some sexual content/nudity
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Comedy
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: THINKFilm, Summit Entertainment, Isle of Man Film, Azure Films, Tusk Productions
Production Countries: United Kingdom
